p.strong: Same inputs, independent weights, parallel outputs

ul.li: Inputs: Same [x₁, x₂] fed to all neurons
Weights: Each neuron has its own [wᵢ₀, wᵢ₁, bᵢ]

text.tspan: # nout independent neurons, each with nin inputs
# All neurons receive SAME input x
